author: Viggo Meesters
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Open SQLite database files as read-only schema, preview, and query views.

manifest.name: SQL Viewer

name: SQL Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Fix SQL Viewer object list layout in Obsidian.

Changes:
- Stack object name and row count in a stable label block.
- Keep type chips at a fixed readable width.
- Remove the cramped Objects panel internal height clamp.

Release assets for Obsidian installation:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
